response: The singer/songwriter who is the Executive Vice President of A&R at Capitol Records is **Nate Albert**. Nate Albert serves as the Executive Vice President of A&R at Capitol Records, a division of Universal Music Group, where he oversees the acquisition and development of music talent. He was formerly Senior Vice President of A&R at Republic Records, working with artists such as The Weeknd, Florence & the Machine, Phantogram, and the Lonely Island.
